description: Use this API to modify or add new GIC branch data to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_brn(ibus,jbus,ckt,realar)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number of the branch as in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number of the branch as in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

realar.description: DC resistance of the branch in ohms/phase. When RBRN is not specified, working case resistance is used to determine RBRN. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rbrn’.
Real part of total branch GMD-induced geoelectric field in volts. When INDVP is not specified, it is calculated as per GMD event. (no default allowed), can also be specified with keyword ‘indvp’.

Imaginary part of total branch GMD-induced geoelectric field in volts. When INDVP is not specified, it is calculated as per GMD event. (no default allowed), can also be specified with keyword ‘indvq’.

DC resistance in ohms/phase of the line shunt at bus IBUS end of the branch. When RLNSHI=0.0 or not specified, there is no ground path this line shunt in DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rlnshi’.

DC resistance in ohms/phase of the line shunt at bus JBUS end of the branch. When RLNSHJ=0.0 or not specified, there is no ground path this line shunt in DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rlnshj’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
